commands.review_summary:
The PR changes gateway model-pricing catalog fetches to read JSON responses through `readResponseWithLimit` and adds a LiteLLM no-Content-Length overflow regression test.

PR surface: Source 0, Tests +65. Total +65 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection, though I did not execute a failing local repro: current main reads pricing bodies with `response.arrayBuffer()` before enforcing the 5 MiB cap, so a no-Content-Length stream can exceed the bound before rejection.
